overview: I built 9 evaluation modules, a 4-section Responsible AI dashboard, and a reusable governance template for my SAFe Feature Spec System.

keyPoints.title: Started at 48% responsible AI coverage — 12 of 25 checks
Reviewer agent consumes ~80% of total pipeline input tokens
Boosted cases returned 0 inventions; every bare case had at least one
Claude Code proactively fixed a per-pass vs. full-run cost cap gap
Server-side verdict logic, not LLM, enforces grounding thresholds
